title: SQL injection in /api/users endpoint
description: User-supplied id parameter is concatenated into a SQL query without parameterisation.

title: Missing authentication rate limiting on login
description: The login endpoint has no rate limiting, enabling credential stuffing and brute-force attacks.

title: Sensitive payment data exposed in API response
description: Full card metadata is returned in the transaction status response.

title: Log injection via unsanitised user input
description: Untrusted input is written to logs without sanitisation.
